target: 4. Complicating Relationships
July 23
Fah~…

(Morning already…?
Mio and Ushio are up already?)

Good morning, Shin-chan.
Did you sleep well?

Good morning.
Thanks for setting up the room.
I slept really well because of that.
…Where's Ushio?
She seems to still be asleep.
Hmm…
You should make up with your sister soon.

(It's not really making up…
Ushio just got angry on her own)

Hey, Shin-chan.
What are you going to do after breakfast?
Since it's been a while, maybe we should walk around the island a bit?
No, I think I'll help out at Kofune today.
Huh, really!?
It's lunchtime, and the tourists are increasing, right?

Yeah, thanks.
It'll make me happy if you're there with me…
Yeah, it'll be reassuring!

I don't know.
I'll try not to hold you back.

It's okay.
You know our store well, Shin-chan.
…Fah~…!
Ah, good morning, sister.
Ah… good morning.
Good morning, Ushio.
Good morning, Shinpei.

Huh?
Did your mood get better after sleeping all night?

Y-You're joking, right!?
Seeing Shinpei's face first thing in the morning
ruins the whole day!

But today, Shin-chan's coming with us, right?
You said you'd help out at the store.

Hmph! If Shinpei's around, I don't need to be there!
I'm going to skip helping out today.

Ushio…
Are you still angry?

Hmph!!
Of course I am!!

I really don't get it, but what
were you so upset about--

I don't get it!
You should think about it more carefully,
and you'll understand!
If I think about it--
I actually wanted to hit you once!

Plus, suddenly hugging me? I can't believe it!
I feel like adding two or three more!
(Oh! Maybe it's about that thing!?)

What's with that?
Sudden thinking--
Ushio, I'm sorry.
Huh?
That, I was wrong.
W-What…?

Um… you know, I couldn't
understand your feelings properly.

S-So that's it?
So you finally understand a little?

I don't want you to hug me.
I'm sorry, Ushio.
That's not what it's about!!
W-What!?

Ah~! This is hopeless!
You didn't understand at all!

Wait, wait!
Then why are you angry!?

That's why!
You should figure it out yourself!
Maybe my conclusion was wrong!

I don't know! I don't care!
I don't know you anymore!

Ah!
Sister, where are you going!?

I'm going back to my room to sleep!
Stop bothering me!
O-Oh… wait…
Ah, it's lively this early.

Good morning, Dad!
Well, good night!

Good night? It's morning!
Are you going to sleep now?
I'm going back to sleep!
What's wrong with that guy?

She seemed in a bad mood last night too,
did you two fight again?

Ah, maybe…
Honestly, I don't get it.
Haha, this one's going to last.

I'm sorry, Shin-chan.
Maybe I teased you too much.

Don't worry.
It'll be okay, somehow.
(Though I'm not sure…)

(This time, I can't seem to figure out
what she's thinking)

(That girl…
Why is she so angry?)
